items.title: Backend Development & API Ecosystems

items.description: Advanced CRM ecosystem optimization for enterprise and mid-market companies. Data modeling, expert Apex and Lightning Web Components (LWC) development, automated commercial workflows, contract management, and seamless approval pipelines.

items.title: High-Performance Web Applications
items.description: Blazing-fast frontend development using Vue.js and AstroJs, delivering intuitive user interfaces with optimized render times. Solutions natively integrated with AWS cloud infrastructure to ensure global scalability and high availability.

products.subtitle: We engineer and operate high-performance SaaS platforms tailored to solve specific business verticals.

core_services.title: Robust Software Engineering with .NET and Node.js
core_services.business_focus: We focus on data stability and processing speed. We build the core business logic that powers critical operations without downtime.
capabilities: Design and implementation of secure, scalable REST APIs.
Rock-solid backend architectures leveraging end-to-end .NET Core (C#) and Node.js.
Advanced modeling, design, and optimization of complex databases (SQL Server).
Critical process automation and multi-country e-invoicing gateway integrations.

core_services.title: Advanced Salesforce Architecture & Optimization
core_services.business_focus: We transform your CRM platform into an optimized operational engine. We design advanced automation that eliminates manual tasks and unifies your commercial workflows.
capabilities: Advanced data modeling and architectural consulting for CRM ecosystems.
Custom development of complex business logic using Apex and Lightning Web Components (LWC).
End-to-end automation of commercial workflows, advanced approval tracks, and operational pipelines.
Secure, native integrations connecting Salesforce with external APIs and cloud platforms.

core_services.title: High-Performance Web Platforms & Cloud
core_services.business_focus: We build fast, intuitive, and lightweight user interfaces that guarantee smooth user experiences, backed by highly available cloud infrastructures.
capabilities: Agile, optimized frontend development using Vue.js and AstroJs.
Exhaustive optimization of load times, rendering, and Core Web Vitals.
Deployment and configuration of serverless architectures and native containers on AWS.
Modular, scalable layouts using Tailwind CSS under clean design architectures.

core_services.title: Cross-Platform Desktop Applications with Electron
core_services.business_focus: We leverage web technologies on the desktop. We build native applications for Windows, macOS, and Linux with optimized performance and deep system integration.
capabilities: Electron performance tuning with custom V8 snapshots and multi-process architecture.
Native bridge API for direct hardware and file system access.
Auto-update systems with CI/CD pipelines for cross-platform distribution.
Multi-process IPC architecture with Context Isolation security enabled.

cta.title: Ready to Build the Future?
cta.desc: Our engineering team is ready to consult on your next technical challenge. Whether it's a massive web migration or a specialized desktop tool, we deliver excellence.

node.desc: Blazing-fast asynchronous processing engineered for resilient microservices and real-time automation pathways.

typescript.desc: Strict static typing on the client-side to safeguard codebase architecture and prevent runtime exceptions at scale.

electron.desc: Native cross-platform execution pipelines to build powerful desktop software using robust web standards.

portfolio.title: Software in Action
portfolio.subtitle: Production systems and architecture built under our proprietary technology standards.

cards.title: VUNO POS — Enterprise Point of Sale System
cards.desc: Full-featured Point-of-Sale system with offline-first architecture, multi-tenant support, real-time inventory management, and native desktop deployment via Electron.

features.text: POS interface with product search, category browsing, and cart management
Multiple payment methods (cash, credit, debit, check) and per-line discounts
Cash drawer management: open/close, expected cash, overage/shortage detection
Offline sales with automatic sync queue via IndexedDB (Dexie.js)
Real-time inventory with variants, kits, lots, serial numbers, and low-stock alerts
Stock transfers between locations and multi-location control
Supplier management, purchase orders, and goods receiving
Admin, cashier dashboards and real-time sales reports

cards.title: VUNO SHOP — E-Commerce Platform
cards.desc: Full-featured e-commerce platform with an Astro-powered storefront, PHP REST API, Stripe payments, multi-currency support, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

features.text: Astro-powered storefront with optimized Core Web Vitals
Product catalog with advanced filtering by category, color, and size
Interactive image gallery with magnifier and quick-view modal
Shopping cart with localStorage persistence and server-side sync
Stripe credit card payments and bank transfer with receipt upload
Multi-currency support with configurable exchange rates
Customer accounts with order history, wishlist, and address management
Comprehensive admin panel with product, order, coupon, and blog CRUD
Inventory management with variant matrix and stock tracking
TOTP 2FA authentication for admin panel security
Automated email notifications with customizable HTML templates
Built-in i18n (Spanish/English) with full translation coverage

cards.title: VUNO RESERVATIONS — Hotel Property Management System
cards.desc: Full-featured Property Management System (PMS) for hotels with bilingual booking website, Stripe payments, front desk reception panel, housekeeping management, and occupancy calendar.

features.text: Bilingual (ES/EN) hotel booking website with room catalog and availability
Room detail pages with amenities, capacity, pricing, and image gallery
Online booking with Stripe payments and bank transfer options
Front desk panel with color-coded room status grid and quick search
Check-in/check-out workflows with automatic invoice generation
Housekeeping status management (available, occupied, cleaning, maintenance)
Occupancy calendar with Gantt-style monthly grid view
Guest directory with stay history and document management
Reservation lifecycle: pending, confirmed, checked-in, checked-out, cancelled
Comprehensive admin panel: rooms, rates, blog, and configuration
TOTP 2FA authentication with role-based access control
Automated email notifications (confirmation, pending, cancellation)

cards.title: VUNO ENVÍOS — Miami-Nicaragua Package Logistics
cards.desc: Digital logistics platform connecting Miami to Nicaragua with virtual locker addresses, package tracking, air and sea freight shipping, and door-to-door delivery services.

features.text: Virtual Miami locker address for international package reception
Air and sea freight shipping with real-time rate calculation
Multi-step package tracking with animated status stepper
Shipping cost estimator by weight, category, and shipping mode
3-tier pricing comparison (pickup, door-to-door, bulk cargo)
Miami warehouse and Nicaragua agency with location info
WhatsApp floating button for instant customer communication
Interactive contact form with simulated send feedback
Responsive bilingual-friendly design with scroll animations
Comprehensive service guides and logistics process information
Cargo insurance information for high-value shipments
Mobile-first responsive design for on-the-go tracking

cards.title: VUNO CRM — Social Selling Platform
cards.desc: Multi-tenant SaaS CRM specialized in social selling, unifying WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook conversations with a full sales pipeline from lead to opportunity to quote to close.

features.text: Unified social inbox aggregating WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook conversations
360° customer profiles with interaction history and lifetime value tracking
Drag-and-drop opportunity kanban with sales stage automation
Quoting engine with line items, cost & margin analysis, discount and tax
Activity and task management with automatic follow-up reminders
Real-time push notifications via WebSocket for new messages and updates
Role-based access control with granular per-entity permissions
Attendance tracking with GPS coordinates and photo check-in/out
Employee management with departments, positions, and organizational chart
PWA support with offline caching and dark mode

cards.title: VUNO DRIVE — Car Rental & Sales Platform
cards.desc: Vehicle rental and sales platform in Nicaragua. Public catalog, multi-step online booking, comprehensive admin panel with check-in/check-out, fleet management, and POS.

features.text: Public catalog
Admin panel (role-segmented: admin, manager, agent, cashier, editor, viewer)
Role-based dashboard stats (admin: general, agent: personal metrics, cashier: POS)
Fleet — vehicle CRUD (Info, Pricing, Photos, Features)
Branches — schedules, holidays, availability
Bookings — list, detail, status changes, check-in/out, penalties, no-show
Extras & Insurance — add-on and coverage CRUD
Sales — POS for direct vehicle sales
Customers — address book, booking history
Pricing tiers: daily / weekly (7d) / monthly (30d) — system auto-applies the best rate

tech_stack: Backend PHP 8.1+ strict mode, SOA (Controllers + Models)

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.text: Vunotek, based in Managua, Nicaragua, is the data controller for the personal information collected through this website. You can reach our data infrastructure team via the agency's official engineering email.

sections.title: 2. Data We Collect
sections.text: We only collect information that you voluntarily provide through our technical contact form: full name, corporate email address, project type, estimated budget, and the technical description of your project requirements.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
sections.text: Collected data is utilized exclusively to analyze your software requirements, draft technical and commercial proposals, and establish direct communication tracks with you or your company. We do not engage in automated tracking or marketing spam.

sections.title: 4. Data Storage & Security
sections.text: Securing your information is our highest priority. All submitted details are safely processed using encrypted channels (HTTPS/SSL) and are stored in cloud environments guarded by strict access controls.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Disclosures
sections.text: Vunotek does not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. Information is only processed by essential cloud infrastructure tools required for system operations (such as trusted database managers or hosting pathways) under strict data processing standards.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.text: You retain the right to access, update, restrict, or request the total deletion of your personal data from our systems at any time. To exercise these rights, simply submit a formal request from your corporate email into our direct engineering channels.

sections.title: 1. Purpose and Scope
sections.text: This website is strictly informative and intended for business-to-business lead generation. It outlines the software engineering, cloud architecture, backend development, and Salesforce consulting services offered by Vunotek.

sections.title: 2. Budget and Estimates
sections.text: The budget ranges and project types selected within the contact form are initial estimations used solely to evaluate technical feasibility. They do not constitute a binding commercial offer or a definitive service agreement. Every single project requires an explicit, signed Scope of Work (SOW).

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.text: All contents, layouts, boilerplate code, logs, and brand components displayed across this website are the proprietary property of Vunotek. Any unauthorized partial or total reproduction is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Disclaimer of Liability
sections.text: Vunotek is not liable for any business decisions made by users based on the high-level technical descriptions provided on this site. Software performance benchmarks (SLAs), such as exact response times or cloud infrastructure availability, are only guaranteed under finalized client contracts.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Trademarks
sections.text: All logos, product names, and trademarks (such as Salesforce, .NET, Vue.js, and others) displayed within the technologies section are the exclusive property of their respective owners. Their inclusion on this website is strictly informational, intended for technical reference, and does not imply any official affiliation, sponsorship, or endorsement by these brands toward Vunotek.
